new_column.content: description: How to create and theme custom components.

old_column.content: Writing component styles in a way that is easy to maintain over the life of a

new_column.content: Writing component styles in a way that is easy to maintain over the life of a

old_column.content: growing and changing project is a challenging task.

old_column.content: To solve this, we came up with the idea of style configuration or `styleConfig`.
